title: UAE denies media reports alleging transfer of funds to Iran

snapshot.title: UAE denies media reports alleging transfer of funds to Iran
snapshot.description: ABU DHABI: The UAE has categorically denied reports published by certain international media outlets alleging the transfer of funds from the UAE to the Iran, including allegations concerning $3 billion. In a statement, the Ministry of Foreign Affairs affirmed that these allegations are entirely false and unfounded, stressing that no frozen Iranian funds have been released,
snapshot.author: WAM
snapshot.pageTitle: UAE denies media reports alleging transfer of funds to Iran | Arab News
